name: vscode-tmgrammar-test-tools
description: POC VS Code extension for inserting caret assertions into TextMate syntax tests.

commands.title: TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Line Assertions
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Line Assertions (Full)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Line Assertions (Minimal)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Replace Line Assertions
TM Grammar Test Tools: Replace Line Assertions (Full)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Replace Line Assertions (Minimal)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Range Assertions
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Range Assertions (Full)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Range Assertions (Minimal)

tmGrammarTestTools.configPath.description: Optional path to the grammar package.json used to load TextMate grammars. Relative paths resolve from the active document's workspace folder.

tmGrammarTestTools.enableCodeActions.description: When enabled, show Code Actions for inserting or refreshing TM Grammar Test Tools assertions at the current cursor or selection.

tmGrammarTestTools.enableCodeLens.description: When enabled, show CodeLens commands for inserting or refreshing line assertions near source lines in syntax tests.

tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.comma.description: Optional shell command that prints grammar file paths for the active document. Supports JSON output or newline-separated paths.

tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.cwd.description: Working directory used when invoking tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.command. Leave empty to use the active document's workspace folder and fall back to project root when the file is outside the workspace. If explicitly set to ${workspaceFolder}, the active file must belong to a workspace folder. Supports ${projectRoot}, ${workspaceFolder}, and ${fileDirname}.

tmGrammarTestTools.scopeMode.description: Controls whether generated assertions use exact full scope stacks or a reduced minimal form.

tmGrammarTestTools.autoLoadInstalledGram.description: When enabled, automatically load grammars contributed by installed VS Code extensions, including built-in ones, before local package.json and provider grammars.

tmGrammarTestTools.compactRanges.description: When enabled, merge disjoint caret ranges that share the same rendered scope list into a single assertion line when the syntax allows it.
